description: Unit of the tracked quantity (e.g. EUR, tCO2, ha). Descriptive only, never used in calculations.

Weighting scheme for aggregating contributions over snapshots and investment periods: "physical" uses the `generators`/`stores` snapshot weightings and the `years` investment period weighting (like the `primary_energy` global constraint); "cost" uses the `objective` weightings (like the cost objective).

If set, per-flow-hour contributions are derived from this column of `n.carriers` with the same semantics as the `primary_energy` global constraint (generator output divided by efficiency, non-cyclic storage depletion).
Price routing this effect's value into the objective (e.g. a CO2 price in currency per tCO2). Applied with `objective` weightings, mirroring emission-price folding into marginal costs.
